chapter_title.en: The Reward for the Ziyārah of Abil Ĥasan ‘Ali ibn Mūsā Al-Riďā (a.s.) in Ťūs

text: 2 حَدَّثَنِي الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ دَاوُدَ الصَّرْمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ الثَّانِي (ع) قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ مَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ أَبِي فَلَهُ الْجَنَّةُ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 2. Ḥasan ibn ‘Abdillāh narrated to me from his father ‘Abdillāh ibn Muḥammad ibn ‘Isā, from Dāwūd Al-Sarmi, who said: I heard Abā Ja’far the Second (Imam Jawād (a.s.)) say: Those who go to the Ziyārah of the grave of my father (a.s.) will be rewarded with Paradise.
